rules.requirement: Pressure relief valves must be inspected and tested at intervals not exceeding 12 months.
rules.evidence_keywords: pressure relief valve PRV inspection test calibration

rules.requirement: Portable fire extinguishers must be inspected every 6 months and serviced annually.
rules.evidence_keywords: fire extinguisher inspection service portable

rules.requirement: Safety committee meetings must be conducted and minuted at least once per quarter.
rules.evidence_keywords: safety committee meeting minutes quarterly

rules.requirement: A qualified safety officer must be appointed and their records maintained.
rules.evidence_keywords: safety officer appointment qualification records

rules.requirement: Pressure vessels must undergo hydraulic pressure testing every 5 years.
rules.evidence_keywords: pressure vessel hydraulic test hydrostatic test

rules.requirement: Documented procedures must exist for all controlled production and service conditions.
rules.evidence_keywords: documented procedure operating instruction SOP controlled conditions

rules.requirement: Internal audits must be conducted at planned intervals, at least every 12 months.
rules.evidence_keywords: internal audit quality audit schedule

rules.requirement: Emergency shutdown (ESD) systems must be tested every 6 months.
rules.evidence_keywords: emergency shutdown ESD system test

rules.requirement: Adequate ventilation and air quality must be maintained and documented.
rules.evidence_keywords: ventilation air quality monitoring record

rules.requirement: Hot work permits must be issued for all welding, cutting, or grinding operations.
rules.evidence_keywords: hot work permit welding cutting grinding fire

rules.requirement: Lifting equipment and cranes must be inspected and load-tested annually.
rules.evidence_keywords: crane lifting equipment load test annual inspection

rules.requirement: Gas detectors must be calibrated and tested every 6 months.
rules.evidence_keywords: gas detector calibration test H2S LEL combustible

rules.requirement: Non-conformances must be documented and corrective actions recorded.
rules.evidence_keywords: non-conformance NCR corrective action CAPA deviation

rules.requirement: All machinery must be fenced and guarded. Inspection records must be maintained.
rules.evidence_keywords: machine guarding fencing safety guard inspection

rules.requirement: Electrical installations in hazardous areas must be inspected every 12 months.
rules.evidence_keywords: electrical installation hazardous area inspection ATEX Ex-proof

rules.requirement: Emergency response drills must be conducted at least twice per year.
rules.evidence_keywords: emergency drill mock drill fire drill evacuation exercise

rules.requirement: Worker competency and training records must be maintained for all personnel.
rules.evidence_keywords: training record competency certification personnel qualification

rules.requirement: Fire fighting equipment must be maintained in working order and inspected regularly.
rules.evidence_keywords: fire fighting equipment maintenance fire hydrant sprinkler

rules.requirement: Boilers must undergo annual inspection and certification by a competent authority.
rules.evidence_keywords: boiler inspection certificate competent authority annual

rules.requirement: Hazard and operability study (HAZOP) must be conducted every 5 years or after major modification.
rules.evidence_keywords: HAZOP hazard operability study review modification
